_metadata.purpose: Drug-group → concrete MIMIC prescriptions.drug name-LIKE patterns. Used ONLY to EXPAND a recognised group phrase (e.g. 'coagulation reversal agent') in a `drug` cohort filter into its member name-LIKE patterns. The raw phrase is always kept as an additional fallback pattern, so an unrecognised drug still grounds by its own name — the registry is convenience, never a hard gate. Patterns are matched case-insensitively (ILIKE '%pattern%') against MIMIC-IV `prescriptions.drug`, whose values use mixed-case generic + brand names.
